name: U S GLOBAL INVESTORS INC
summary: U.S. Global Investors, Inc. is a Texas-based registered investment adviser managing two business segments: Investment Management Services and Corporate Investments. The company provides investment advisory and administrative services to U.S. Global Investors Funds (USGIF) mutual funds and four U.S.-based ETFs (JETS, GOAU, SEA, WAR) plus one European UCITS ETF (TRIP). Total AUM was approximately $1.32 billion as of June 30, 2025, with expertise in gold mining, natural resources, and airlines.

products.name: U.S. Global Jets ETF (JETS)
products.description: ETF focused on airline and travel sector with $814 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: The Travel UCITS ETF (TRIP)
products.description: European-based ETF focused on travel sector with $20 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: U.S. Global Sea to Sky Cargo ETF (SEA)
products.description: ETF focused on cargo and transportation sector with $8 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: U.S. Global GO GOLD and Precious Metal Miners ETF (GOAU)
products.description: ETF focused on gold and precious metal miners with $124 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: U.S. Global Technology and Aerospace & Defense ETF (WAR)
products.description: ETF focused on technology, aerospace and defense with $6 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: Gold and Precious Metals Fund (USERX)
products.description: Mutual fund focused on gold and precious metals with $157 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: World Precious Minerals Fund (UNWPX)
products.description: Mutual fund focused on precious minerals with $49 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: Global Resources Fund (PSPFX)
products.description: Mutual fund focused on global natural resources with $41 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: Global Luxury Goods Fund (USLUX)
products.description: International equity mutual fund focused on luxury goods with $51 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: U.S. Government Securities Ultra-Short Bond Fund (UGSDX)
products.description: Bond mutual fund focused on U.S. government securities with $29 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.

products.name: Near-Term Tax Free Fund (NEARX)
products.description: Bond mutual fund with $25 million AUM as of June 30, 2025.
